TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Bngwan ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 5 buwan, 22 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 19 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Amis 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bngwan hya' ga Nan'ao. tay 'zil na Bngwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bngwan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Bngwan hya' ga 三星鄉. tay mkraya' na Bngwan hya' ga Syanox. tay mkyahu' na Bngwan hya' ga Sengan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βŋwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa * βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa nanʔao. taj ʔzil na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa ***. taj mkrajaʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕjanox. taj mkjaħuʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
S.FORM: alang Bngwan ga niya mki sku Girang Keng atu Tayto go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 5 buwan, 22 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 86% kyan ku 19 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 14% kyan ku 3 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Tayan 77%, Amis 9%. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Bngwan hya' ga Nan'ao. tay 'zil na Bngwan hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Bngwan hya' ga Hualien. tay mkraya' na Bngwan hya' ga 三星鄉. tay mkraya' na Bngwan hya' ga Syanox. tay mkyahu' na Bngwan hya' ga Sengan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ βŋwan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku ɣiraŋ keŋ atu tajto ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa * βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, tajan **%, amis~ɕ *%. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa nanʔao. taj ʔzil na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa ħualien. taj mkrajaʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa ***. taj mkrajaʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕjanox. taj mkjaħuʔ na βŋwan ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕeŋan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
